summary: Verified client-side pagination on /fitosanitarios page. All requirements from the review request passed: pagination-top bar with info/page-size/first/prev/current/next/last controls renders; only pageSize rows rendered (25 by default, 100 when changed); navigation Next/Last/First works with correct info text and disabled states at extremes; page size change resets to 1/20 with 100 rows; both filter changes (Tipo select) and search input (MICROTHIOL) reset pagination to page 1 via fetchProductos.
critical_code_review_comments: Fitosanitarios.js is 1453 lines - exceeds 700-line guideline. Consider splitting into subcomponents (Filters, ProductTable, PaginationBar, ImportPanel, MapaPanel).

React hydration/DOM nesting warnings observed in console: '<span> cannot be a child of <option>/<select>/<tr>/<tbody>' and '<td> cannot be a child of <span>'. Caused by data-ve-dynamic instrumentation wrappers (display:contents spans) around <option>, <th>, <tr>, <td> inside .map() calls in Fitosanitarios.js (lines 998, 1351, 1369, 1372). Not blocking pagination, but should be addressed (they cause hydration errors and could break in future React strict/concurrent scenarios).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Client-side pagination on Fitosanitarios page is fully verified. Observed values: 1970 productos total, 79 pages @25/pp, 20 pages @100/pp. Search input placeholder is 'Nombre, registro, materia activa...' (not 'Buscar'), use data-testid or placeholder*='Nombre'. Filter Tipo has data-testid=filter-tipo. Pagination testids: pagination-top, pagination-info, pagination-page-size, pagination-first, pagination-prev, pagination-current, pagination-next, pagination-last. All navigate/reset behaviors work.
rca of the issue: N/A - feature verification, no bugs found
